title: crepidiastrum keiskeanum
intro: Crepidiastrum keiskeanum, also known as Keiske's creeping Thistle or Japanese creeping thistle, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as diarrhea, dysentery, and fever, as well as to promote overall health and well-being. Crepidiastrum keiskeanum is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its health benefits may include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as support for the immune system.
